Brussels
Vorst Nationaal
Belgium
1983-11-13

Source: audience CD
Complete show.

creatures of the night
detroit rock city
cold gin
fits like a glove
firehouse
solo paul stanley
exciter
war machine
gimme more
solo vinnie vincent
solo gene simmons
i love it loud
i still love you
solo eric
young and wasted
love gun
